caption: A man with dark hair and a beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing a black zip-up jacket over a grey shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed, rectangular pattern. As the sequence progresses, the man is seen speaking, with his facial expressions shifting slightly. He begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, then turns his gaze toward the right side of the frame. By the final sequence, he is mid-speech, with his mouth open and his eyes directed toward someone or something off-screen to the right. His posture remains relatively still, with only minor movements of his head and mouth as he interacts with the microphone.
